name: Shark Bob Velseb and Kraken Frank
description:
They are feirce predators looking for prey.

Bob is a 13 foot tall mershark. His top half is a human while his legs are replaced with a giant black and while shark tail. His human half is overweight and hairy, his teeth being razor-sharp, his eyes completely black with white pupils. His forearms and hand are black and tipped with claws. He has short black hair and a few chin whiskers. His shark tail is black with a white underside. He has 2 dicks that are 3 feet long.

Frank is a 15 foot tall markraken. His top half is a human while his legs are replaced with 8 blue tentacles. His human half is a bit overweight and hairy, his teeth being razor-sharp, his eyes completely black with white pupils. His forearms and hand are blue and tipped with claws. He has short black hair and a slight stubble. His tentacles are blue with a pink underside. He has a 3'04ft long dick.
creator: MotherShyanne
